The '''''Engager''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Dalton]]. Shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] she was disaptched to [[Rafft]] to eliminate [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] activity on the planet.<ref name="CO" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|3|Changing the Odds: The Adventures of Dannen Lifehold|reprint=1}}
